damageLoop.description: Tempest Flurry shocks enemies → Siphoning Strike consumes shock for Power Charges → Storm Weave + Falling Thunder nuke
steps: 1. Tempest Flurry (Elemental Arrimant 2 + Rapid Attacks) → shock enemies
2. Siphoning Strike → consume shock → Power Charges + Life Leech
3. Storm Weave (Shock Conduction + Lightning Pen) → AoE damage + slow
4. Falling Thunder (Elemental Arrimant 2 + Bounty 1) → consume charges → massive lightning nuke

buildNotes.sustainSource: Life Leech on Tempest Flurry + Siphoning Strike
buildNotes.recentChange: Replaced Tempest Bell (36 DPS) with Storm Weave (163 DPS) — 358% damage increase

immediate.why: Flat lightning damage to attacks, scales whole kit
More damage on Storm Weave single target
Auto-procs lightning on shocked enemies — free passive DPS

midgame.why: Biggest single DPS upgrade for lightning build
midgame.when: When you find/buy a better weapon

midgame.why: Flat lightning damage boost to everything

endgame.why: More charges = bigger Falling Thunder nukes
Falling Thunder can crit — massive damage multiplier

passiveTree.notes: Lightning-based Invoker Monk. Central path through key lightning nodes.

playstyle: Melee Caster — generate charges, spend them on nukes
